metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills by MCS

plugins.name: opsx-ext
plugins.description: Extensions for OpenSpec — autonomous task workflows with self-correction and verification loops

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Clean, minimal git commits — conventional-style summary, optional bullet body, no co-author trailers

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-Driven Development workflow — Red/Green/Refactor discipline with test-first design

plugins.name: cli-anything-go
plugins.description: Build powerful, stateful CLI interfaces for any GUI application as compiled Go binaries using Cobra + bubbletea.

plugins.name: engineering-principles
plugins.description: Meta-skills that shape how Claude approaches code — DRY thinking on every edit, and evidence-based investigation for every bug and code change.

plugins.name: architectural-analysis
plugins.description: Static-analysis skills that surface architectural problems in a codebase — hotspot detection, coupling and cohesion signals, refactor-target ranking.

plugins.name: skill-builder
plugins.description: Drop-in replacement for skill-creator with blind eval authoring — evaluation prompts and assertions are written by a subagent that has never seen the skill's body or scripts, fixing the implementation-bias flaw in the upstream workflow.

plugins.name: quality-assurance
plugins.description: Quality-engineering skills — smoke testing, build-verification gates, regression discipline. Includes the smoke-test skill that auto-detects a project's stack and scaffolds a focused 5-10 check suite in the right framework (FastAPI/pytest, Express/Vitest, Go httptest, axum/tower).
